title: ERP-MES Core (ISA-95)
description: Canonical ISA-95 / IEC 62264 foundation for building ERP-MES products on ISPF: equipment/material/personnel models, process segments and work masters, work schedule -> job order -> job response with genealogy, quality gate, inventory documents, maintenance lite, shift calendar, OEE (ISO 22400) and idempotent verb x noun ERP transactions (Part 5). Industry-neutral core: assemble concrete MES/ERP systems as data overlays, no schema changes.
changelog: 1.0.0 - initial ISA-95 canonical ERP-MES core bundle: 12 migrations, 61 BFF functions, 5 dashboards, 5 reports, singleton hub, BPMN job-dispatch workflow

changelog.notes: Initial release: ISA-95 Parts 1-5 + ISO 22400 OEE subset, certified by ErpMesCoreIntegrationTest happy path
